response.justification: While Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience and has a strong foundation in full-stack development, his profile does not align with the Director-level scope of this Principal Engineer role. He lacks the deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML strategy, enterprise-level cloud architecture, and executive customer advisory experience necessary to drive strategic AI initiatives at this seniority level.
strengths: Possesses over 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse technology stacks.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as the founder and developer of GISCollective.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the Director-level strategic leadership and executive customer advisory experience required for the role.
Missing deep, recognized expertise or advanced degrees (MS/PhD) specifically in AI and Machine Learning.
Historical focus has been predominantly on full-stack web development rather than specialized AI/Cloud platform strategy.
